justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'tomorrow' as June 1st, but offered 2 PM instead of the user's preferred 'around 3 o'clock'.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in two turns without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, leading to a successful booking without any friction points.
